message:
test(height-predictor): add 14 unit tests for Bayesian height predictor

Cover config defaults, default predictor state, unknown category
fallback, auto-category creation, violation rate computation,
category observation accessors, posterior accessors for unknown
categories, register_category sequential IDs, observe within-bounds
return value, total measurements tracking, and prediction bounds
ordering invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
